summary: Great vibe with Jerry’s playing shining through, recording sounds fine though details are unknown
review: The reviewer loves the feeling of Jerry mixed with the band and says it always lifts their spirits – a clear sign of a positive musical experience. No specific technical comments were made, so while the sound quality is assumed to be adequate, its exact source and fidelity remain unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the performance (especially Jerry) with no noted recording flaws, leading to a high rating but low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewer did not mention any issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes the overall feel‑good atmosphere of Jerry’s presence with the band, suggesting a consistently enjoyable set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Positive – his playing mixed with the boys always makes the reviewer feel better.
